qa_steps: Opened Ágora settings via CDP by clicking the ⚙️ Admin button.
Verified lateral channel list updated and feed auto-selected new channel without full reload.
Verified API contains new channel via /api/plugins/agora/channels.
Tested duplicate slug returns API error message 'Já existe um canal com esse slug.' displayed in form.
Tested invalid slug beginning with underscore returns client validation error.
